file.string: Permission denied. Please enable it in Settings.
To start trading without any restrictions, please complete your KYC verification.
Your KYC verification has been rejected, kindly re-attempt your KYC.
This can take upto 48H. You will be notified upon completion until then please refrain to raise ticket.
You have made over %1$s attempts for KYC verification. Kindly raise a ticket to reach out to our support team.
Verify now to maintain seamless access
Please re-verify to get full access
Please complete bank verification to start trading on your account
Your bank account is currently under verification, we will process your bank as quickly as possible.
Please add your bank account to enable fiat transactions.
Your bank verification has been rejected. Please try again.
Seamless trading awaits as you begin your crypto journey.
Your account has been restricted. Please visit help.zebpay.com for assistance.
Kindly verify your email address to Buy/Sell crypto currencies safely.
Verify to trade without any restrictions
Please re-verify to get full access
Add account to enable fiat transactions
Please select a different asset to continue.
Transaction limit exhausted. Try again tomorrow.
Transaction limit exhausted. Try again later.
Max allowed orders reached. Try again later.
